channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: House Democrats plot barrage of anti-tariff votes after stunning GOP failure
item.description: House Democrats are already planning to force votes overturning at least two of President Trump's tariffs , with more likely to follow, senior lawmake...

item.title: Trump to Netanyahu: U.S. prefers deal with Iran to war, for now
item.description: President Trump stressed after a three-hour meeting with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Wednesday that he wants to keep pursuing a deal ...

item.title: Former Senate Leader Mitch McConnell discharged from hospital after week-long stay
item.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) was discharged from the hospital Tuesday after checking in last week due to "flu-like symptoms," his spokesperson said in...

item.title: Trump's revenge tour falls flat in the courts
item.description: President Trump has increasingly tested how far political retribution can stretch into the justice system, but his efforts to prosecute his perceived ...

item.title: El Paso airspace shutdown sparks D.C. blame game
item.description: The Trump administration is blaming a "cartel drone incursion" for the sudden closure of the airspace around El Paso , Texas on Wednesday, though sour...

item.title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
item.description: Follow President Trumpâs progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington ...

item.title: National Guard troops were quietly withdrawn from some U.S. cities
item.description: The deployments encountered repeated legal setbacks that stymied President Donald Trumpâs desire for a show of force in Los Angeles, Chicago and Portl...

item.title: Pam Bondi lashes out as lawmakers press her on Epstein, cases against Trump foes
item.description: The attorney general lobbed insults when lawmakers questioned her decisions and portrayed the Justice Department as unfairly maligned by Democrats and...

item.title: In rebuke, House opens door to challenging Trumpâs tariffs
item.description: Three Republicans joined Democrats in rejecting an attempt to block votes that would end the national emergency underpinning the presidentâs tariffs.

item.title: Democrats seek to counter Trump, boost 2028 profiles on European tour
item.description: Gavin Newsom, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ruben Gallego and Gretchen Whitmer hope to reassure anxious European allies at the Munich Security Conference.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Vance tries to thread affordability needle in Rust Belt
item.description: The vice president fine-tunes Trumpâs economic message, but he's only got so much wiggle room.

item.title: Ex-Trump voters swung hard to Democrats over costs in NJ & VA, new research shows
item.description: Voters who backed Donald Trump in 2024 and swung to Democrats in this year's Virginia and New Jersey elections did so over economic concerns, accordin...

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with âThe Emperor of All Maladiesâ author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called âamazing and impressiveâ despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
